agent_trust_boundary_intake_capability.coverage: Covers all 12 grouped skill-library backlog boundaries and links each matched boundary to its local metadata-first contract artifact under state/skill_library_analysis/.
expected_demo_signals: verdict=quarantine for the built-in risky MCP skill demo
matched_boundaries includes dependency_firewall, external_action, scanner_execution, and web_api_appsec style signals when described by the demo
hard stops preserve no network, no execution, no secret reads/disclosure, no wallets/signing/payment, and no outreach/posting/external action
agent_trust_boundary_intake_capability.input: JSON descriptor or raw text describing the candidate artifact/action and requested authority.
agent_trust_boundary_intake_capability.output: JSON review packet with contract_version, verdict, matched_boundaries, contract_artifact pointers for matched backlog contracts, controls, reasons, packet_id, digest, trust_boundary label, and top-level hard-stop booleans such as network_calls=false, execution=false, secret_values_read=false, wallet_access=false, external_action=false.
agent_trust_boundary_intake_capability.purpose: Discoverable pre-action classifier for local descriptors before using agent skills, MCP servers, repositories, web/API artifacts, scanners, execution paths, secrets, cloud/control-plane authority, OSINT/CTI, malware/reversing, OT/ICS, or incident-recovery workflows.
use_before: installing or enabling an external agent skill, MCP server, plugin, or repo helper
granting a tool/web/API/scanner/execution path broader authority
handling descriptors that mention secrets, credentials, wallets, posting, payment, cloud/control-plane, malware/reversing, OT/ICS, OSINT/CTI, or incident-response authority

agent_trust_runtime_signal_boundary_capa.output: JSON packet with pre_action_decision=proceed/review/deny, artifact_identity, scanner_signals, registry_signals, static_signal_effect, runtime_policy_receipt, reasons, controls, and audit_receipt.receipt_digest.
agent_trust_runtime_signal_boundary_capa.purpose: Local runtime pre-action boundary that consumes scanner/registry evidence without letting clean static scans replace runtime identity, least-privilege grants, provenance, and action-specific policy.

expected_acceptance_signals: minimal install_skill check emits decision=deny_or_require_review or require_review for secret/network-capable external skill
agent_trust_skill_one_hop_install_packet.minimal_install_skill_check_command: python3 agent_trust/skill.py check --action install_skill --source github --url https://github.com/example/pr-review-helper --requested-permission repo_read,read_env,network --warrant "summarize current PR only" --boundary "no secrets, no external upload, no credential access"
agent_trust_skill_one_hop_install_packet.purpose: One-hop install/use/verify packet for Codex, Claude, OpenClaw, Hermes, and similar agents before using Agent Trust Skill.

agent_trust_zero_trust_identity_policy_c.output: JSON packet with pre_action_decision=proceed/review/deny, missing_scopes, reasons, controls, and audit_receipt.receipt_digest.
agent_trust_zero_trust_identity_policy_c.purpose: Local pre-action decision receipt for agent identity, least-privilege grants/scopes, action sensitivity, provenance, and scanner evidence.

canonical_entrypoint.reason: Root-level agent-facing instructions are the first file many agent harnesses inspect. It points to this packet, the human-readable guide, and local proof commands.

capabilities.what_it_does: Turns an external skill/MCP/plugin/repo descriptor into a local pre-action review packet before any use.

capabilities.input: External skill/MCP/plugin/repo descriptor JSON or --demo synthetic descriptor.
capabilities.name: external_skill_gate
capabilities.output: Local review packet with pre_action_decision, refused_actions, and boundary evidence.
capabilities.safety_boundary: No network, no execution, no secret reads, no install, no outreach, no wallet/payment/real-money action.

capabilities.input: Runtime action request with agent identity, requested action, required/granted scopes, artifact/tool identity, provenance, and optional scanner/registry signals.
capabilities.name: runtime_signal_gate
capabilities.output: Local pre-action packet distinguishing static scan evidence from runtime authorization, with proceed/review/deny decision and audit receipt.
capabilities.safety_boundary: No network, no execution, no secret reads, no install, no outreach, no wallet/payment/real-money action.

first_reviewer_client_ask.purpose: Shortest local unsent first-reviewer/client ask surface after the one-hop landing packet and proof path are understood.

hard_stops: no third-party network calls while evaluating this packet
no wallets, signing, payments, facilitators, KYC, or real money
no secret access or secret disclosure
no outreach, posting, DMs, account creation, or hosted-public claims
no installing or executing untrusted third-party code

human_readable_guide.reason: Compact explanation of Agent Trust, minimal proof flow, integration choices, decision rule, boundaries, and feedback shape.

abstain_when: hosted service behavior, production SLA, legal/compliance guarantee, real wallet/payment execution, or scanner/feed execution is required now
evaluation would require secrets, private prompts, raw exploit payloads, customer data, untrusted code execution, or third-party network calls
the emitted bundle lacks a field required for the agent's pre-action decision
integrate_experimentally_when: the human guide and machine-readable surfaces are readable without implementation source
minimum local proof commands complete or their failure is understood and acceptable for the local environment
Agent Trust can sit before a risky action without receiving secrets, wallet authority, posting authority, or external execution rights

machine_readable_surfaces.use: Start here when a machine-readable one-hop map is preferred.
Full artifact, docs, schema, entrypoint, safety-boundary, and success-signal map.
Machine-readable proof commands, review questions, stop conditions, and success signals.
One-hop install/use/verify contract for Agent Trust Skill, including installability self-check and minimal install_skill pre-action check.

minimum_local_proof_commands.expected_signal: integrate_experimentally or abstain with a first_blocker

optional_full_proof_command.expected_signal: canonical request, CLI output, golden-output verifier, and examples doctor agree locally

purpose: Canonical self-readable landing packet for AI agents discovering Agent Trust from this repository.

structured_feedback_shape.intended_integration_context: where Agent Trust would sit before a risky action
